name: Is this game alive? : r/Mindustry - Reddit

name: Gameplay Ideas · Issue #446 · Anuken/Mindustry - GitHub
snippet: You can access the Beta directly on the Play Store. There should be an icon for joining the beta. It is really amazing and add a whole bunch of new items.

name: Anuken - Mindustry Unofficial Wiki - Fandom
snippet: He primarily operates via GitHub and Discord, as well as composing all of the music used in the game and creating the art in Animdustry.

name: New Gamemode · Issue #6000 · Anuken/Mindustry-Suggestions
snippet: Describe the content or mechanics you are proposing. This idea comes from how I used to play Mindustry on my phone in v5.

name: Additional functionality for payload conveyor. · Issue #1748 - GitHub
snippet: At the moment, Mindustry has the ability to install and remove blocks from the payload conveyor using some iterations of the mono unit.

name: Mindustry
snippet: A sandbox tower-defense game. Defend your base from waves of powerful enemies. A high-level Mindustry base in combat with a wave of many low-level enemies.
